name: degoog.us
tagline: Privacy-first Proton affiliate site — get Google out of your life
description: Content site steering readers from Google services to Proton alternatives (Mail, Drive, VPN, Calendar, Pass). Phase 0 half-done: domain registered, Cloudflare configured, Jekyll installed, brand system locked (Void Black/Ghost White/Signal Green/Privacy Purple, Montserrat + Inter + JetBrains Mono). Legal: ThompsonBlack LLC dba TGWAB. Revenue via Proton Partner Program.
